description: List issues in a GitHub repository, filterable by state, labels, and assignee.
Get full details of a specific issue including body, comments, and labels.
Create a new branch from a specified base branch.
Get pull request details including diff, files changed, and metadata.
Get the CI/check run status for a pull request or commit SHA.
Submit a review on a pull request (APPROVE, REQUEST_CHANGES, or COMMENT).
Merge a pull request using the specified strategy (merge, squash, rebase).
Delete a branch from the repository.
